title: The Invisible Victories
content: Best EAs are invisible. Nobody knows what disasters we prevented. That double-booked meeting that got fixed? The email that got rewritten? The calendar conflict that disappeared? That's us. Quietly winning.
extended_content: I keep a 'wins' folder. Every thank-you note, every crisis averted, every time someone says 'I don't know what I'd do without you.' On bad days, I read through it. The thing about support roles - the better you are, the more invisible you become. Problems just... don't happen. People forget that problems not happening IS the accomplishment. I don't forget.
when_to_tell: when someone feels unappreciated or unseen
lesson: The absence of problems is its own kind of success
